input.headline: Polar vortex could bring wild weather pattern

raw.headline: Polar vortex could bring wild weather pattern

winner: Why did the weatherman refuse to join a polar dance group? Because he was concerned about the unpredictable swing of the vortex partner!

candidates.text: Why did the snowman break up with his girlfriend? Because she said they needed a polar change!
